violations.summary: Congress passes an omnibus bill bundling unrelated subjects — defense appropriations, immigration rules, and drug pricing — in a single bill, in violation of the single-subject rule of Article II Section 10.7.

satisfied_duties.duty: rule on the single-subject challenge within 15 days
satisfied_duties.outcome: ruled within the 15-day window, found a single-subject violation, and returned the bill to the originating chamber for severance or redrafting

ai_summary.primary_violation: Congress passes an omnibus bill bundling unrelated subjects — defense appropriations, immigration rules, and drug pricing — in a single bill, in violation of the single-subject rule of Article II Section 10.7.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
